assertions.description: The PCB analyzer correctly identifies the 4-layer stackup (F.Cu, In1.Cu/GND, In2.Cu, B.Cu), 59 footprints (52 schematic components + 4 logos/signs + 3 blank-reference logo footprints), 75 vias, 680 track segments, and confirms complete routing with 0 unrouted nets. Board dimensions 51.5x19.0mm match the gerber Edge.Cuts. Net count 51 matches the schematic.

INCORRECT: The DFM checker reports tier_required='advanced' for 0.127mm minimum track spacing, with standard_limit_mm also set to 0.127mm (actual == standard_limit). The message 'requires advanced process (standard: 0.127mm)' is contradictory: if the actual value equals the standard limit, it should pass as standard. Furthermore, 0.127mm (5mil) is well within the capability of standard PCB processes (most standard fabricators handle 6/6 or 5/5 mil). The threshold logic appears to trigger 'advanced' when actual >= standard_limit rather than when actual < standard_limit.
